# Week 3 Generated Files

This directory contains the principal implementation artifacts generated during the AI-assisted mixed-signal RTL-to-GDS investigation.

| File                               | Description                                                                  |
| ---------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `design_mux_synthesized_netlist.v` | Synthesized gate-level netlist generated by Yosys.                           |
| `design_mux_floorplan.def`         | DEF after floorplanning.                                                     |
| `design_mux_globalplacement.def`   | DEF after global placement.                                                  |
| `design_mux_routed.def`            | Final routed DEF used for implementation verification.                       |
| `design_mux.magic.gds`             | Final GDS layout generated by the Magic streamout stage.                     |
| `RTL_to_GDS_trace_summary.md`      | Summary of the stage-by-stage verification.                                  |
| `macro_presence_verification.md`   | Final verification of the AMUX2_3V macro throughout the implementation flow. |

These files were used during the Week 3 investigation to verify that the `AMUX2_3V` analog macro was preserved throughout synthesis, floorplanning, placement, routing and final layout generation.
